Uses of Class
neqsim.process.safety.blowby.GasBlowbyAnalyzer

Packages that use GasBlowbyAnalyzer
Package
Description
neqsim.process.safety.blowby
 

  • Uses of GasBlowbyAnalyzer in neqsim.process.safety.blowby

    Methods in neqsim.process.safety.blowby that return GasBlowbyAnalyzer
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    GasBlowbyAnalyzer
    GasBlowbyAnalyzer.setDischargeCoefficient(double cd)
    Sets the discharge coefficient of the restriction.
    GasBlowbyAnalyzer
    GasBlowbyAnalyzer.setDownstreamPressure(double pressure, String unit)
    Sets the downstream (low-pressure protected system) pressure, typically the design or relief set pressure.
    GasBlowbyAnalyzer
    GasBlowbyAnalyzer.setDownstreamReliefCapacity(double capacity, String unit)
    Sets the downstream relief capacity that must absorb the blowby gas.
    GasBlowbyAnalyzer
    GasBlowbyAnalyzer.setGas(SystemInterface gas)
    Sets a NeqSim fluid from which the specific-heat ratio and molar mass are derived during analyze().
    GasBlowbyAnalyzer
    GasBlowbyAnalyzer.setMolarMass(double molarMass, String unit)
    Sets the molar mass of the gas directly.
    GasBlowbyAnalyzer
    GasBlowbyAnalyzer.setRestrictionArea(double area, String unit)
    Sets the effective flow area of the fully open restriction directly.
    GasBlowbyAnalyzer
    GasBlowbyAnalyzer.setRestrictionDiameter(double diameter, String unit)
    Sets the effective flow diameter of the fully open restriction.
    GasBlowbyAnalyzer
    GasBlowbyAnalyzer.setSpecificHeatRatio(double k)
    Sets the specific-heat ratio (Cp/Cv) of the gas directly.
    GasBlowbyAnalyzer
    GasBlowbyAnalyzer.setUpstreamPressure(double pressure, String unit)
    Sets the upstream (high-pressure source) pressure.
    GasBlowbyAnalyzer
    GasBlowbyAnalyzer.setUpstreamTemperature(double temperature, String unit)
    Sets the upstream (high-pressure source) temperature.
